data.body:
Concrete evidence from the PERSISTED completion sidecars (COMPLETION_VERDICT events; NO re-run / no new LLM calls):

ad9f-45f1-339f-4346 — two verifier runs minutes apart, IDENTICAL code at HEAD:
- Run A (COMPLETION_VERDICT @ 1784840651): verdict FAIL, 2 unmet:
    (1) '...verify-commit-ticket ... auto-mounts ... — regression test'
    (2) 'explain (and init/scratch) are NOT force-mounted — guard test'
  Both details EXPLICITLY acknowledge the implementation exists (cited _cli/__init__.py:406-407, _init.py ensure_store_mounted_best_effort, _NO_AUTO_MOUNT line 42) — the criterion was marked unmet only because the verifier did not confirm/credit a TEST.
- Run B (COMPLETION_VERDICT @ 1784840960): verdict PASS, 0 unmet — the SAME two criteria => True.

Both tests DO exist (tests/interfaces/facades/test_central_mount_gate_ad9f.py: a fresh-clone verify-commit-ticket regression test AND an explain no-force-mount guard test). So the non-determinism is NARROWLY in the verifier's TEST-EXISTENCE crediting on criteria phrased '... — regression test / guard test': Run A false-negatived both; Run B credited both. The implementation assessment was STABLE across runs (recognized both times); only the test acknowledgment flipped.

Refined hypothesis: the flip is concentrated on 'is there a test for this?' judgments, where the verifier must locate test coverage in the tree. Sampling variance flips borderline 'couldn't find it' vs 'found it'. Suggested mitigations (unchanged) especially benefit here: (a) deterministic decoding; (b) for '... test' criteria, a deterministic pre-pass that greps/enumerates test files and feeds the verifier the concrete candidates so 'did a test exist' is not left to free-form search; (c) multi-sample quorum.

Contrast (NOT flakiness): 4de6 COMPLETION_VERDICT @ 1784841301 FAIL/1-unmet was a TRUE positive — it correctly cited the no-op 'Re-close to certify against the current tree' message at transition_close.py:688-692. Fixed in change 937. This shows the verifier's true-positives are reliable; the instability is specifically false-NEGATIVES on test-existence.
